description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a smooth, light brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape, providing a clean and structured appearance. The left side of the sofa extends into a chaise lounge, offering additional lounging space, and is adorned with three small, light-colored throw pillows. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive silhouette. The sofa is supported by a black metal sled-style leg frame that runs along the base, giving it a slightly elevated and contemporary look. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting, emphasizing sleek lines and comfort.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light brown leather with a chaise lounge, straight padded armrests, and black metal sled legs. Features uniform seat and back cushions with three light throw pillows.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shaped layout, chaise lounge on the left, three seat and back cushions, and three light throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the full length of the black metal base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest, the length of the main seating area, and the arrangement of the throw pillows on the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and aligned; three small, loose throw pillows on the chaise section.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a minimalist, unadorned design.
attribute_leg_design: Black metal sled-style legs running along the base at the corners and under the main sections, slightly recessed for a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light brown leather or leather-like upholstery with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible stitching or pattern.
